about.label: About
about.heading: Designed to stay editable as your work evolves
description: I am a blockchain developer focused on building secure, scalable, and real-world applications using Hyperledger Fabric and modern web technologies.

My work spans decentralized identity, land registry systems, and smart contract development. I continuously refine my projects by improving performance, adding new features, and adapting to real-world use cases.

items.label: Focused on solving real-world problems like land ownership tracking and secure transactions.
Designs systems that scale from prototypes to production environments.
Constantly improving skills in blockchain, backend systems, and distributed architectures.
Experienced with Hyperledger Fabric, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and REST APIs.

experienceSection.label: Experience
experienceSection.heading: Work that shaped my Professional Career.

description: Currently working as a Blockchain Developer, focusing on building and enhancing private permissioned blockchain networks using Hyperledger Fabric
focusing on R&D, implementing real-world projects, and ensuring scalability, availability, and performance while delivering enterprise-grade blockchain solutions.
descriptions: Designing and deploying scalable and secure network architectures using Hyperledger Fabric, including peers, channels, and ordering services tailored to enterprise requirements.
Developing and maintaining chaincode using Go/Node.js to automate business logic, ensuring data integrity, transparency, and trust across the network.
Implementing robust identity management using Fabric CA with role-based access control to ensure only authorized participants can access and modify data.
Building user-friendly decentralized applications (DApps) that allow users to interact with the blockchain for record verification, transaction tracking, and secure data access.
Integrating blockchain networks with backend systems and external services using REST APIs and Fabric SDKs for seamless enterprise adoption.
Monitoring, troubleshooting, and optimizing blockchain network performance to ensure high availability, scalability, and efficiency in production environments.

items.description: Delivered blockchain-focused features across backend services and connected interfaces.
descriptions: Built backend APIs and connected them to frontend interfaces for smoother product workflows.
Planned modular project structure so features stayed easier to maintain over time.
Handled bug fixes, feature delivery, and iterations based on evolving requirements.

items.title: Land Record Management System
items.description: Land Record Managemnet System is based on privta blockchain Hyprrledger Fabric Network. It is design to push data on blockchain so data is immutable and tamperproof and all the records must be tracable on blockchain.
details: Designed and developed a decentralized land record system using Hyperledger Fabric to ensure data immutability and transparency.
Built a private permissioned blockchain network, allowing only authorized stakeholders (e.g., government officials, land inspectors) to access and update records securely.
Implemented smart contracts (chaincode) to automate land transactions, ownership transfers, and validation processes—reducing manual errors and fraud.
Enabled tamper-proof storage of land records where once data is written, it cannot be altered, ensuring long-term reliability and trust.
Developed traceability features allowing users to track the complete history of land ownership and transactions on the blockchain.
Integrated role-based access control, ensuring different user roles (admin, registrar, citizen) interact with the system securely and efficiently.
Designed an interactive user interface/dashboard where users can:
🔍 Search and verify land ownership records
📜 View transaction history in a transparent manner
🧾 Request ownership transfer digitally
✅ Validate authenticity of land documents
Leveraged peer nodes and ordering service in Hyperledger Fabric to maintain consensus and ensure reliable transaction processing.
Improved data security and auditability compared to traditional centralized systems by eliminating single points of failure.
Demonstrated how blockchain can reduce corruption, fraud, and disputes in land management systems.

items.title: Decentralized Exchange
items.description: A DEX built with React, Solidity, and Node.js for smart contract-based trading, wallet interaction, and backend-driven price services.
details: 🌐 Developed a full-stack Decentralized Exchange (DEX) using React for a responsive and interactive frontend interface
⛓️ Designed and deployed smart contracts using Solidity on the Polygon Testnet for secure and efficient token swaps
🖥️ Built backend services using Node.js to handle API requests, user authentication, and blockchain interaction
📊 Integrated real-time price feeds to enable accurate token valuation during trading operations
🔗 Connected frontend with smart contracts using Web3 libraries for seamless wallet interaction and transaction execution
🔐 Structured the project with modular architecture to ensure scalability and maintainability Implemented secure authentication and request handling to enhance user trust and system reliability
⚡ Continuously improved the platform by fixing bugs, optimizing performance, and iterating on features based on testing and feedback
